reviews.comment:
Un oasis en el camino, en nuestro caso, a Catamarca, ideal llenar el tanque, tomarse un rato en el bar y seguir camino. Hay mesas entre los árboles y parrillas si el descanso puede prolongarse, todo muy limpio y muy amable la atención.

(Translated by Google)
An oasis on the road, in our case, to Catamarca, ideal for filling up the tank, taking a break at the bar, and continuing on. There are tables among the trees and grills if you want to linger, everything is very clean, and the service is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdHNDZGRBEAE

reviewer.displayName: Mariano Angel Pereyra Nieto - Asesor La Rioja

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo donde está posicionado la estación cuenta con shop y se come muy bien .

(Translated by Google)
The station's location is very nice, it has a shop and the food is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtcklMRWVREAE

reviews.comment:
Esta en un lugar estratégico, tiene muy buenos baños, todos los combustibles no tiene gas, un full con snacks y lbebidas, cuenta con lugar para descansar a la Sombra.

(Translated by Google)
It's in a strategic location, has very good bathrooms, all fuels (no gas), a full kitchen with snacks and drinks, and a place to rest in the shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbU5MMm53RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención esta bien, los sanitarios están muy limpios. Lo único malo es que no dejan ingresar con perritos a la tienda, y para alguien que viaja sola con su mascota es problemático.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, and the restrooms are very clean. The only downside is that they don't allow dogs in the store, which is problematic for someone traveling alone with their pet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMta1BIT0Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Única estacion de Servicios entre los cruces de ruta a Cordoba Catamarca y La Rioja . Buena atención.Bar y baños disponibles.

(Translated by Google)
The only service station between the highway intersections to Cordoba, Catamarca, and La Rioja. Good service. Bar and restrooms available.
